mapper.select: SELECT DATE(m.created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS value FROM chat_message m INNER JOIN chat_session s ON m.session_id = s.id WHERE s.agent_id = #{agentId} AND m.created_at >= #{startDate} AND m.role IN ('user', 'assistant') GROUP BY DATE(m.created_at) ORDER BY DATE(m.created_at)

SELECT t.date, IFNULL(AVG(t.msg_count), 0) AS value FROM ( SELECT DATE(m.created_at) AS date, m.session_id, COUNT(*) AS msg_count FROM chat_message m INNER JOIN chat_session s ON m.session_id = s.id WHERE s.agent_id = #{agentId} AND m.created_at >= #{startDate} AND m.role IN ('user', 'assistant') GROUP BY DATE(m.created_at), m.session_id ) t GROUP BY t.date ORDER BY t.date
